description_long: This is a round, white ceramic ashtray with three evenly spaced notches along the rim for resting cigarettes. The exterior is adorned with red and gold Polish text, including the name 'Jakob Haberfeld' and references to Oświęcim, as well as a central crest or emblem on the inner base. The ashtray has a shallow bowl shape, with a slightly raised rim and a smooth, glossy finish. The text and emblem are printed or glazed onto the surface, giving it a decorative and vintage appearance. The object is compact and designed to sit on flat surfaces, suitable for use in public or social settings.
description: A round, white ceramic ashtray with red and gold Polish text, three cigarette notches, and a central emblem. It has a glossy, smooth finish and a shallow bowl shape.
description_view_0: This view highlights the ashtray's front with the 'JAKOB HABERFELD' text and crest clearly visible, as well as one of the cigarette notches.
description_view_1: This angle shows more of the gold text and the side profile, emphasizing the shallow bowl and another cigarette notch.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the 'I ZŁOTE MEDALE' text and the third notch, with the crest partially visible inside.
description_view_3: This side view focuses on the 'OSWIECIM' and 'SPECJALY' text, with the rim and notches clearly defined.
attribute_signage_or_labeling: Decorative Polish text and central emblem with brand and location information
